ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gfl_index" (
  "indicator" TEXT /* Indicator code for the GFLI */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the series */,
  "series_description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "geo_area_code" INTEGER /* Geographic area code */,
  "geo_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic area */,
  "time_period" INTEGER /* Time period of the data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the GFLI */,
  "time_detail" TEXT /* Detailed time period (if applicable) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "footnote" TEXT /* Footnote for the data (if any) */,
  "nature" TEXT /* Nature of the data (e.g., M for Measurement) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the GFLI */,
  "reporting_type" TEXT /* Type of reporting (e.g., G for Global) */,
  "series_code" TEXT /* Code for the series */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date of data collection */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id", "geo_area_code", "time_period"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gfl_index_update_frequency FOREIGN KEY ("update_frequency") REFERENCES update_frequency ("update_frequency"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gfl_index_reporting_type FOREIGN KEY ("reporting_type") REFERENCES reporting_types ("reporting_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gfl_index_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_areas" (
  "geo_area_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic area */,
  "geo_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic area */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the geographic area belongs */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion to which the geographic area belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the geographic area */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the geographic area in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the geographic area in billion USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_area_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_types" (
  "reporting_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting type */,
  "reporting_type" TEXT /* Code for the reporting type (e.g., G for Global) */,
  "reporting_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the reporting type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporting_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "data_collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "data_collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection */,
  "data_collection_description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "update_frequency" (
  "update_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update frequency */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Code for the update frequency (e.g., M for Monthly) */,
  "update_frequency_description" TEXT /* Description of the update frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_frequency_id")
)
column_names: Nature of the data (e.g., M for Measurement)
Type of reporting (e.g., G for Global)
Unique identifier for each geographic area
Region to which the geographic area belongs
Subregion to which the geographic area belongs
Land area of the geographic area in square kilometers
GDP of the geographic area in billion USD
Unique identifier for each data source
Unique identifier for each reporting type
Code for the reporting type (e.g., G for Global)
Unique identifier for each data collection
Unique identifier for each update frequency
Code for the update frequency (e.g., M for Monthly)
